headline: how does FICA tip credit work Preparation Checklist — Chicago
articleBody:
how does FICA tip credit work Preparation Checklist for Chicago Clients

Before your how does FICA tip credit work appointment with FICA Tax Credits & Refunds, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact FICA Tax Credits & Refunds at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
